title: Admin - View Vendor Details - Functional Test Plan
author: QA Automation
overview: Functional testing of the Admin View Vendor Details modal/panel on the AT/AD Admin Portal. Covers the View Details trigger from vendor cards, modal/panel display with all vendor fields (business details, category, contact person, email, phone, website, address, GST number, application date, products listed), read-only behavior, modal close/dismiss behavior, and cross-tab verification.

inScope: View Details button/link on vendor cards
Display of all vendor detail fields: business details, category, contact person, email, phone, website, address, GST number, application date, products listed
View Details across all status tabs
outOfScope: Vendor list and tab functionality (covered by SCRUM-469)
Vendor deleted while modal open (requires backend manipulation)
Focus trap and ARIA dialog attributes (complex accessibility checks)
No products / no website edge cases (require specific data states)

relatedStories: SCRUM-469 - View Vendor Lists by Status (vendor cards with View Details)

prerequisites: Admin is signed in to the Admin Portal

testCases.title: Verify View Details button/link is present on vendor cards
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Clicking View Details opens a modal/panel
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the vendor list page with vendor cards visible
steps: Navigate to the vendor list page
Locate a vendor card
Verify a View Details button or link is visible on the card
expectedResults: View Details button/link is present and clearly labeled

testCases.title: Verify clicking View Details opens a modal or panel
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Clicking View Details opens a modal/panel
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the vendor list page with vendor cards visible
steps: Click the View Details button on a vendor card
Verify a modal or side panel opens
Verify the modal/panel contains vendor information
expectedResults: A modal or panel opens with an overlay or slide-in animation
Vendor detail content is displayed inside the modal/panel

testCases.title: Verify Business Details are displayed in the modal
testCases.preconditions: Vendor details modal is open for a vendor with complete data
steps: Open View Details for a vendor with known business details
Locate the business details section
Verify business name or organization details are displayed
expectedResults: Business name/organization information is displayed correctly

testCases.title: Verify Category is displayed in the modal
steps: Open View Details for a vendor
Locate the category field
Verify the vendor category is displayed (e.g., Manufacturer, Distributor, Service Provider)

testCases.title: Verify Contact Person is displayed in the modal
steps: Open View Details for a vendor with a known contact person
Locate the contact person field
Verify the contact person name is displayed
expectedResults: Contact person name is displayed correctly

testCases.title: Verify Email, Phone, and Website are displayed in the modal
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Modal displays email, phone, website
testCases.preconditions: Vendor details modal is open for a vendor with all contact info
steps: Open View Details for a vendor
Verify email address is displayed
Verify phone number is displayed
Verify website URL is displayed
expectedResults: Email address is visible and correctly formatted

testCases.title: Verify Address is displayed in the modal
steps: Open View Details for a vendor with a known address
Locate the address section
Verify the full address is displayed

testCases.title: Verify GST Number is displayed in the modal
testCases.preconditions: Vendor details modal is open for a vendor with a GST number
steps: Open View Details for a vendor with a known GST number
Locate the GST number field
Verify the GST number is displayed correctly
expectedResults: GST number value matches the vendor's registered GST

testCases.title: Verify Application Date is displayed in the modal
steps: Open View Details for a vendor
Locate the application date field
Verify the application date is displayed in a readable format
expectedResults: Date is displayed in a readable format (e.g., DD/MM/YYYY or similar)

testCases.title: Verify Products Listed section is displayed in the modal
testCases.preconditions: Vendor details modal is open for a vendor with products
steps: Open View Details for a vendor with known products
Locate the products listed section
Verify product names or count are displayed
Verify the products match the vendor's actual product catalog
expectedResults: Product names or count are displayed
Products match the vendor's actual catalog

testCases.title: Verify modal is read-only — fields are not editable
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC2 - Modal is read-only unless explicitly editable
steps: Open View Details for a vendor
Attempt to click on or edit the business details field
Attempt to click on or edit the contact person field
Attempt to click on or edit the email field
Attempt to click on or edit the address field
Verify no fields are editable (no text cursors, no input focus)
expectedResults: Business details field is not editable
Contact person field is not editable
All fields are displayed as read-only text, not input fields

testCases.title: Verify modal can be closed via close button or overlay click
steps: Open View Details for a vendor
Locate the close button (X) on the modal
Click the close button
Verify the modal closes
Open the modal again
Click outside the modal (on the overlay/backdrop)
Verify the modal closes
expectedResults: Modal closes on close button click
Modal is dismissed and vendor list is visible
Clicking outside the modal closes it

testCases.title: Verify modal can be closed via Escape key
steps: Open View Details for a vendor
Press the Escape key
Verify the modal closes
expectedResults: Modal closes and focus returns to the vendor card or list

testCases.title: Verify View Details works from all status tabs
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - View Details opens from vendor cards
testCases.preconditions: Vendors exist in all status tabs
steps: Click View Details on a vendor in the Pending Approval tab — verify modal opens
Close modal
Click View Details on a vendor in the Active Partners tab — verify modal opens
Close modal
Click View Details on a vendor in the Inactive Partners tab — verify modal opens
Close modal
Click View Details on a vendor in the Rejected Partners tab — verify modal opens
expectedResults: Modal opens for pending vendor with correct details
Modal opens for active vendor with correct details
Modal opens for inactive vendor with correct details
Modal opens for rejected vendor with correct details
testCases.postconditions: View Details works across all tabs

testCases.title: Verify complete View Vendor Details flow end-to-end
testCases.preconditions: Admin is signed in and vendors with complete data exist
steps: Navigate to the vendor list page
Click View Details on a vendor card
Verify modal opens with all fields: business details, category, contact person, email, phone, website, address, GST number, application date, products listed
Verify all fields are read-only
Close the modal via close button
Verify modal closes and vendor list is visible
expectedResults: All vendor detail fields are displayed with correct data
testCases.postconditions: Full view vendor details flow is verified

vendorData: Vendor with all fields populated (business details, category, contact person, email, phone, website, address, GST, application date, products)
Vendors in all four status tabs (Pending, Active, Inactive, Rejected)

assumptions: Admin Portal is accessible and admin sign-in works (SCRUM-442)
Vendor list with status tabs is available (SCRUM-469)
View Details opens as a modal dialog or side panel
risks: Modal vs panel implementation is ambiguous — could be either
openQuestions: Is the vendor detail view a modal dialog or a side panel?
Is the 'Products listed' section a list of product names, a count, or clickable links?
What is the expected date format for Application Date?
Note: 'Contact person & role' was changed to 'Contact person' (role removed) on 2026-04-15, and 'category' was added on 2026-04-15. Confirm these are intentional.
notesFromChangelog: Description updated 2026-02-10: 'view possibility' added to uploaded verification documents.
Description updated 2026-04-15: 'category' field added to modal fields.
Description updated 2026-04-15: 'Contact person & role' changed to 'Contact person' (role removed).
